name: Stuffed Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 2 cans tomato sauce, divided (about 8 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first 11 ingredients and one can of tomato sauce; mix well.
2. Stir in the chopped tomatoes.
3. Halve the zucchini lengthwise and remove the seeds.
4. Fill each half with the meat mixture.
5. Place the stuffed zucchini into two 9 x 13 baking dishes.
6. Spoon the remaining tomato sauce over each stuffed zucchini.
7. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 45 minutes, or until the zucchini is tender.
8. Sprinkle with cheese during the last few minutes of baking.
